title: Knarfy's Dumb Enchantments
description: The Enchantments Added to the game as suggested by Knarfy's Audience!
body:
# Knarfy's Dumb Enchantments
### **_Based on Your Ideas!_**

Check out the original video by Knarfy here:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XvMq9hhaxbg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### This mod includes 13 new enchantments based on comments from YouTube!
Each enchantment does something different, and combinations of different enchantments can result in some wild chaos. These are especially fun in PvP.

![The Enchantments in a Box](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cd83a74163b703275bae94daefbbbaf649d5c2f.png)

### Enchantments
`Rocks` _(Weapons)_ - Mobs drop cobblestone when attacked\
`Eco-Friendly` _(Weapons)_ - A tree grows where the entity dies (biome-dependant)\
`Bane of Squidward` _(Weapons)_ - Deals 500% damage to mobs with big noses\
`Dedication` _(Hoes)_ - Grants an advancement depending on the tier of hoe enchanted\
`Subscribe` _(Helmets)_ - Do what it says\
`Curse of Small` _(Armor)_ - Makes the wearer much smaller. Also applies to mobs\
`Knockbad` _(Weapons)_ - Reverse of Knockback. Combining both together goes crazy\
`Curse of Instability` _(Weapons)_ - Increasing likelyhood of spontaneous explosion with enchantment level\
`Fairness` _(Weapons)_ - Gives opponent a copy of your weapon (to make it fair ofc)\
`YEET` _(Basically Anything)_ - Makes item throwable!\
`Curse of Disloyalty` _(Tridents)_ - Tridents will turn around and attack you\
`Bubble` _(Bows)_ - Traps attacked entity in a bubble and drops them from high up\
`Uno Reverse` _(Shields)_ - Deals the damage to the attacker with an Uno Reverse card appearing on their screen

These enchantments are available in the creative inventory as books, naturally in the enchanting table, and with the `/enchant` command! _(Some may not work exactly as intended, but we did our best!)_

Huge shoutout to TheTaciturnOne (Tac) for putting this mod together! Check out her content on [[Twitch]](https://www.twitch.tv/thetaciturnone) and [[YouTube]](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCaTuE0Tp1A1WEBRyK0jmGrA)
